title: rubus × incarnatiflorus
intro: Rubus × incarnatiflorus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or introduced raspberry, is a complex hybrid of the wild raspberry species, specifically a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of ellagic acid, which has been shown to have potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × incarnatiflorus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus × incarnatiflorus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
